name: Barbers Hill High School Tennis Courts
description: Barbers Hill High School Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baytown, TX. There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Baytown Community Center
description: Baytown Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Baytown, TX. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Baytown Recreation Center
description: Baytown Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Baytown, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Goose Creek Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Goose Creek Community Center in Baytown, TX! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Little Eagle Park
description: Little Eagle Park is a place to play pickleball in Mont Belvieu, TX. There are 12 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and restrooms.
